programme.title: The Murder Line
programme.desc: Canadian drama series. Henry scrambles to cover his tracks while staying ahead of Erica's growing suspicions and urges Tommy to co-operate with the authorities.

programme.title: DMV: Department of Motor Vehicles
programme.desc: Sitcom following staff at the East Hollywood Department of Motor Vehicles. Colette pines for her coworker Noa while enduring teasing from her colleagues.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Countdown's Rachel Riley and radio host Richie Anderson take on screen stars Lesley Joseph and Claire Sweeney in a battle in aid of charity.

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

programme.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Alex Brooker, Vicky Pattison and Max Whitlock all trying to guess well-known phrases in aid of charity.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Milton Keynes plays host to the dealer's den. David Ford gets cracking with a huge ceramic egg deal, and Tracy pays out big for a gold cigarette case.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: The fast-paced game of words hosted by Adil Ray - crossing words to beat the reigning Lingo champions this time are friends Chris and Jake and pals Kiran and Sarah.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh guides Tony from Newcastle, Linda from Penrith, Roger from Monmouthshire and Rebecca from Manchester as they take on a Chaser in a battle of wits.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast: Green Party
programme.desc: A Party Election Broadcast on behalf of the Green Party.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: How to Clean Up for Cash
programme.desc: Josie and the team face their biggest challenge yet, secretly helping Ashley box up and value a room full to the brim with her mum Mandy's lifetime of auction bundle buys.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: It's the baby shower, but Charity and Jacob fail to make it. Charity goes into labour. Jacob has a secret meeting.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Debbie learns that Carl is in hospital, Maggie sends Eva to confront Megan, Jodie spots something troubling among the Platts' mail, and Theo shows Summer his true colours.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the series enters its final week, the campmates feel the pressure. With another elimination on the horizon, discover who remains with the chance of becoming a Legend.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: The Murder Line
programme.desc: No Room at the No Tell Motel: Canadian drama series. Chaos unfolds as Henry realises that his family is in danger, and Miles and Ruby's drug operation takes a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: As the series enters its final week, the campmates feel the pressure. With another elimination on the horizon, discover who remains with the chance of becoming a Legend.

programme.title: The Murder Line
programme.desc: Canadian drama series. Tommy is determined to recover the missing drugs and regain favour with New York kingpin Duke, and Duke's enforcers arrive to pressure May.

programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Tony Audenshaw, Tamzin Outhwaite and Phil Tufnell all trying to 'say what they see'.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: The dealers den winds up in Wolverhampton. It's dinner for one when a Vienna plate comes to Tony Geering's table.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: The game of words hosted by Adil Ray - trying to Lingo all the way this time are best friends Kiran and Sarah, partners Dan and Jono, and mother and daughter Kelly and Georgia.

programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Dave from the West Midlands, Elaine from Cardiff, Ian from the East Riding of Yorkshire and Ashley from Salford think that they can take down a Chaser.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Adil Ray hosts the game of words as sports stars Judy Murray and Mark Pougatch try to go the distance against Morning Live's Helen Skelton and Rav Wilding and win big for charity.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Charity is in labour, trapped in a lift. Mark and Ross do their best. The villagers await news from the hospital.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Eva uses Will's secret phone to contact Megan, Carla and Lisa prepare for their hen parties, Jodie reluctantly introduces Shona to Olivia, and George gives Theo a warning.

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: The camp reaches breaking point when two celebrities explode during a trial. With the competition on a knife edge, discover who stays in the running and who leaves the show.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Anna Maxwell Martin is grilled by autistic and learning-disabled interviewers. From shoplifting confessions to the question of whether she's neurodivergent, nothing is off limits.

programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.desc: Canadian drama series. Flashbacks reveal how young Henry and Tommy met at a boxing gym, Erica's team make a grim discovery in the present, and Tommy makes a bold move.
